name: Chicken in Wine
recipeInstructions:
1. Rinse the chicken parts and pat them dry.
2. Season the chicken lightly with salt and pepper.
3. In a skillet, melt butter over medium heat. Quickly brown the chicken pieces; use a slotted spoon to remove them and place them in the Crock-Pot.
4. Sauté the onion and mushrooms in the same skillet until tender.
5. Add sherry to the skillet and stir, scraping up any browned bits from the bottom of the pan.
6. Pour the contents of the skillet into the Crock-Pot over the chicken.
7. Sprinkle Italian seasoning over the top.
8. Cover and cook on Low for 8-10 hours or on High for 3-4 hours.
9. Serve the chicken over fluffy rice, spooning any sauce over the top.
Serves 4 to 6
